name: Bean Mexican Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can red beans, 15 1/2 oz (drained and rinsed)
1 can kidney beans, 16 oz (drained and rinsed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook the ground turkey until no longer pink.
2. Add onions and bell peppers; cook until vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in taco seasoning mix, taco sauce, red beans, kidney beans, tomatoes, and water.
4. Simmer for 30 minutes.
